creator: yom@iaelu.net
text:
(In reply to Guillaume Bibaut from comment #7)
After reading the Undefined Symbol string a few time, I happened to find that it was related with abseil package. So I've tried to get that package back from the package repository with:

pkg install -F -f abseil
pkg install -f abseil

And it fixed my problem!

I had tried some commands with pkg check, but it always returned no error.
Sorry for the inconvenience!
